papers.title: An Efficient Approach for Calculating Free Energy in Molecular Dynamics: Demineralization of Hydroxyapatite as a Case Study
papers.summary: Despite the strength of Molecular Dynamics simulations in providing insights into the microscopic details of phenomenon in many fields in materials science, physics and biology, the biggest barrier is its limited timescale which is several orders of magnitude lower than the timescale of the real-world processes and phenomena being modeled. Free energy calculations are designed as a remedy to this problem that in theory can overcome this barrier. This is particularly relevant for biomineralisation processes such as tooth mineral formation and dissolution, while reflecting a broader challenge in accurately modelling rare events and long-timescale phenomena across complex molecular systems. However, due to the novelty of the field, a number of questions remain outstanding pertaining to the best practice of applying this method. The non-equilibrium work approach based on the Jarzynski equation is one of the most promising free energy calculation methods. However, the biggest challenge for the broader use of this method is the question of how many simulations are required for an accurate free energy estimation. Comparing the free energy results with very long reversible pulling simulations of atom clusters from the surface, each taking 75 days on the 48-core Intel Xeon Platinum 8268 CPUs, in this study we showed that this question is irrelevant and higher quality and better equilibrated initial structures is the proper approach than simply based on the number of simulations. We designed a new adaptive free energy calculation methodology which combines high quality, high computational cost free energy values with lower quality, lower cost values to build up the entire free energy profile. In the best case scenario this method lowers manifold the computational cost required for the non-equilibrium work free energy calculations compared to both the regular method and the reversible simulation.
papers.abstract_cn: 尽管分子动力学模拟在材料科学、物理学和生物学等许多领域中能够为现象的微观细节提供洞见，但其最大障碍在于受限的时间尺度，这一时间尺度比所建模的真实世界过程和现象的时间尺度低数个数量级。自由能计算被设计为解决这一问题的补救方法，理论上可以克服这一障碍。这一点对于牙齿矿物形成和溶解等生物矿化过程尤为相关，同时也反映了在复杂分子体系中准确建模稀有事件和长时间尺度现象所面临的更广泛挑战。然而，由于该领域较为新颖，关于应用该方法的最佳实践仍有许多悬而未决的问题。基于 Jarzynski 方程的非平衡功方法是最有前景的自由能计算方法之一。然而，更广泛使用该方法所面临的最大挑战在于：为了准确估算自由能，需要进行多少次模拟。通过将自由能结果与从表面拉出原子簇的极长可逆拉伸模拟进行比较——每次模拟在 48 核 Intel Xeon Platinum 8268 CPU 上耗时 75 天——本研究表明，这个问题本身并不相关；相比于仅仅依据模拟次数，采用质量更高且平衡更充分的初始结构才是更合适的方法。我们设计了一种新的自适应自由能计算方法，该方法将高质量、高计算成本的自由能数值与较低质量、较低成本的数值相结合，以构建完整的自由能剖面。在最佳情况下，与常规方法和可逆模拟相比，该方法可成倍降低非平衡功自由能计算所需的计算成本。
papers.reading_notes:
Focus: 微电子器件与材料.
What to check: 功耗或能效表现.
Context: An Efficient Approach for Calculating Free Energy in Molecular Dynamics: Demineralization of Hy….

papers.title: Radio-frequency reflectometry in silicon carbide large-area transistors
papers.summary: Radio-frequency (RF) reflectometry is widely used for high-bandwidth readout of semiconductor quantum devices at cryogenic temperatures, but its application has mainly been limited to nanoscale structures with relatively small capacitances. Here, we investigate RF readout in a different regime by applying gate-based reflectometry to a large-area silicon carbide transistor with parasitic capacitances orders of magnitude larger than those of typical quantum devices, conditions normally expected to hinder RF readout. We observe a gate-dependent RF response which degrades and eventually vanishes as temperature is lowered, although MOSFET operation in DC transport is maintained down to deep cryogenic temperatures. We attribute this behaviour to impedance changes introduced by carrier freeze-out in the transistor drift region, and propose a modified circuit configuration designed to restore sensitivity under these conditions. These results establish how parasitic pathways and device geometry can limit RF readout, providing insight into the design of scalable cryogenic-CMOS quantum systems.
papers.abstract_cn: 射频（radio-frequency, RF）反射测量广泛用于低温下半导体量子器件的高带宽读出，但其应用主要局限于电容相对较小的纳米尺度结构。本文通过将基于栅极的反射测量应用于一种大面积碳化硅晶体管，研究了另一种工作区域下的 RF 读出；该晶体管的寄生电容比典型量子器件大数个数量级，而这种条件通常被认为会阻碍 RF 读出。我们观察到一种依赖于栅压的 RF 响应，该响应随着温度降低而退化，并最终消失，尽管 MOSFET 在直流输运中的工作可一直维持到深低温。我们将这种行为归因于晶体管漂移区载流子冻结所引入的阻抗变化，并提出了一种改进的电路配置，旨在这些条件下恢复灵敏度。这些结果阐明了寄生通路和器件几何结构如何限制 RF 读出，为可扩展低温 CMOS 量子系统的设计提供了认识。
papers.reading_notes:
Focus: 晶体管.
What to check: 与既有工艺平台的集成价值.
Context: Radio-frequency reflectometry in silicon carbide large-area transistors.

papers.title: Proton-shuttling nanosheet membranes enable high-power-density protonic fuel cells
papers.summary: High-temperature operation enhances the efficiency and design simplicity of electrochemical devices, but conventional polymer membranes lose proton conductivity rapidly due to dehydration. Atomically thin nanosheets can selectively transport thermal protons through nanoscale corrugations and quantum tunneling, making them promising for high-temperature proton-conducting membranes. However, stacked nanosheet assemblies often suffer from poor proton transport between layers. We built nanosheet-based membranes by bridging individual nanosheets using nanoconfined phosphoric acid. This architecture enables low-tortuosity, synergistic proton transport via both through-nanosheet conduction and hydrogen bond–mediated hopping along confined acid layers, resulting in ultrafast, stable proton conduction under anhydrous high-temperature conditions. A polyethylenimine-functionalized graphene/boron nitride bilayer membrane achieves a proton conductivity of 166 millisiemens per centimeter and delivers a power density of 1011 milliwatts per square centimeter in hydrogen fuel cells at 250°C, outperforming most previously reported anhydrous proton-conducting membranes. Furthermore, it exhibits superior methanol tolerance, achieving 502 milliwatts per square centimeter on concentrated methanol. This work offers a versatile platform for next-generation high-temperature proton-conducting membranes.
papers.abstract_cn: 高温运行能够提高电化学器件的效率并简化设计，但传统聚合物膜会因脱水而迅速失去质子电导率。原子级薄的纳米片可以通过纳米尺度褶皱和量子隧穿选择性传输热质子，因此有望用于高温质子传导膜。然而，堆叠纳米片组装体通常存在层间质子传输不佳的问题。我们通过使用纳米限域磷酸桥接单个纳米片，构建了基于纳米片的膜。这种结构通过贯穿纳米片的传导以及沿限域酸层的氢键介导跳跃，实现了低曲折度、协同质子传输，从而在无水高温条件下获得超快且稳定的质子传导。聚乙烯亚胺功能化石墨烯/氮化硼双层膜实现了 166 毫西门子每厘米的质子电导率，并在 250°C 的氢燃料电池中输出 1011 毫瓦每平方厘米的功率密度，优于此前报道的大多数无水质子传导膜。此外，它表现出优异的甲醇耐受性，在浓甲醇条件下实现了 502 毫瓦每平方厘米的功率密度。本工作为下一代高温质子传导膜提供了一个通用平台。
papers.reading_notes:
Focus: nanosheet.
What to check: 性能提升、效率/耦合表现、可靠性与稳定性.
Context: Proton-shuttling nanosheet membranes enable high-power-density protonic fuel cells.

papers.title: Depletion-mode N-polar AlN-based high electron mobility transistors with improved on/off ratios
papers.summary: We report N-polar AlN-based high-electron mobility transistors (HEMTs) with a GaN channel thickness of 5.2 nm on N-polar AlN on sapphire. The threshold voltage is around -2.4 to -3.0 V with saturation currents over 240 mA/mm and on/off ratios as high as 10,000, much higher than previously reported N-polar AlN-based HEMTs. The high on/off ratio is attributed to the use of an abrupt AlN/GaN heterostructure with a dedicated AlN transition layer, together with improved gate leakage. The high frequency properties as well as the on-resistance of ~20 Ohm mm are all limited by the 2000 Ohm/square sheet resistance of the channel layer.
papers.abstract_cn: 我们报道了基于 N 极性 AlN 的耗尽型高电子迁移率晶体管（high-electron mobility transistors, HEMTs），其在蓝宝石衬底上的 N 极性 AlN 上具有 5.2 nm 厚的 GaN 沟道。阈值电压约为 -2.4 至 -3.0 V，饱和电流超过 240 mA/mm，开关比高达 10,000，显著高于此前报道的基于 N 极性 AlN 的 HEMT。高开关比归因于采用了带有专用 AlN 过渡层的突变 AlN/GaN 异质结构，并同时改善了栅极漏电。高频特性以及约 ~20 Ohm mm 的导通电阻均受到沟道层 2000 Ohm/square 方块电阻的限制。
papers.reading_notes:
Focus: 晶体管.
What to check: 性能提升、接触/互连相关指标.
Context: Depletion-mode N-polar AlN-based high electron mobility transistors with improved on/off ratios.

papers.title: Berry-phase in a periodically driven single molecule magnet transistor
papers.summary: We consider the electron transport through a single molecule magnet transistor in the presence of a local transverse magnetic field and ac-driven gate voltage. We calculate the conductance as a function of the electron energy and transverse magnetic field by using the Floquet and Landauer formalism. We show that the time periodic potential causes zero transmission resonances that oscillate as a function of the transverse magnetic field due to the Berry phase interference associated with two quantum tunneling paths. We find that these Berry phase oscillations can be detected in the conductance as a function of the transverse magnetic field for an incoming electron with a specific energy.
papers.abstract_cn: 我们考虑了在局域横向磁场和交流驱动栅电压存在下，电子通过单分子磁体晶体管的输运。我们利用 Floquet 和 Landauer 形式体系，计算了电导随电子能量和横向磁场的变化。我们表明，时间周期性势会导致零透射共振；由于与两条量子隧穿路径相关的 Berry 相位干涉，这些共振会随横向磁场发生振荡。我们发现，对于具有特定能量的入射电子，可以在电导随横向磁场的变化中探测到这些 Berry 相位振荡。
papers.reading_notes:
Focus: 晶体管.
What to check: 功耗或能效表现.
Context: Berry-phase in a periodically driven single molecule magnet transistor.

papers.title: Non-volatile memories based on patterned metal–semiconductor heterostructures of niobium disulfide and molybdenum disulfide
papers.summary: Nature Electronics, Published online: 19 May 2026; doi:10.1038/s41928-026-01634-z Patterned and scalable two-dimensional metal–semiconductor heterostructures formed between niobium disulfide and molybdenum disulfide can be created using an in situ sulfurization process and used to make field-effect transistors and non-volatile memory devices.
papers.abstract_cn: 《Nature Electronics》，在线发表：2026年5月19日；doi:10.1038/s41928-026-01634-z。可图案化且可扩展的二维金属—半导体异质结构可通过原位硫化工艺在二硫化铌和二硫化钼之间形成，并可用于制备场效应晶体管和非易失性存储器件。
papers.reading_notes:
Focus: 半导体.
What to check: 器件性能、实验结果和潜在应用价值.
Context: Non-volatile memories based on patterned metal–semiconductor heterostructures of niobium disulf….

papers.title: Colossal dielectric perovskites enable Coulombic interfacial β-phase stabilization
papers.summary: Soft piezoelectric polymers hold promise for the advancement of flexible wearable sensors offering self-powered precise monitoring capability. However, their long-term stability of performance is often constrained by modest crystallinity and insufficient dipole alignment. To conquer this, we fabricated a polymer-inorganic hybrid via Coulombic interfacial field anchoring. Using the colossal permittivity perovskite (CaCu 3 Ti 4 O 12 ) as a dielectric template intensifies interfacial field under electrospinning, driving fluoropolymer chain into all-trans conformation and stabilize ferroelectric switching. This electrostatic coupling elevates the β-phase content and remanent polarization, delivering an exceptional 700% gain in piezoelectric response relative to pure poly(vinylidene fluoride). Leveraging the stable electromechanical response and mechanical endurance, the nonwoven fabric were implemented into a helmet liner, which maps impact location and severity in real time, and a three-dimensional–structured insole enabling early-stage fall detection. This works demonstrates a Coulombic interaction–driven intermolecular anchoring approach to produce high-performance organic-inorganic piezoelectric nanocomposites, expanding the capabilities of electromechanical smart monitoring.
papers.abstract_cn: 软压电聚合物有望推动柔性可穿戴传感器的发展，使其具备自供能精确监测能力。然而，其长期性能稳定性常受限于有限的结晶度和不足的偶极取向。为克服这一问题，我们通过库仑界面场锚定制备了一种聚合物—无机杂化材料。以巨介电常数钙钛矿（CaCu3Ti4O12）作为介电模板，可在静电纺丝过程中增强界面场，驱动含氟聚合物链转变为全反式构象，并稳定铁电翻转。这种静电耦合提高了 β 相含量和剩余极化，使压电响应相对于纯聚偏二氟乙烯提升了 700%。利用其稳定的机电响应和机械耐久性，该非织造织物被集成到头盔衬垫中，可实时映射冲击位置和严重程度；同时还被制成三维结构鞋垫，实现早期跌倒检测。本工作展示了一种由库仑相互作用驱动的分子间锚定方法，用于制备高性能有机—无机压电纳米复合材料，拓展了机电智能监测的能力。
papers.reading_notes:
Focus: 介电材料.
What to check: 性能提升、效率/耦合表现、可靠性与稳定性.
Context: Colossal dielectric perovskites enable Coulombic interfacial β-phase stabilization.

papers.title: Giant optical spin-orbit interactions in ferroelectric van der Waals waveguides
papers.summary: Optical spin-orbit interactions (SOI) link photonic spin to momentum, offering a route toward on-chip polarization control and beam steering. Nevertheless, achieving sufficient optical SOI and nonlinearities on sub-micrometer scales - a prerequisite for dense photonic integration - remains an outstanding challenge. Here, we show that highly birefringent van der Waals (vdW) waveguides provide an ideal, chip-compatible platform to address this limitation. We focus on the ferroelectric semiconductor NbOI2, which exhibits record optical nonlinearities and dielectric anisotropy. Using femtosecond optical microscopy, we image light propagation and harmonic conversion beyond the total internal reflection barrier over tens of micrometers in NbOI2 slab waveguides. We report giant optical spin-splitting through the optical spin Hall effect, which facilitates spatial separation of optical spin currents on sub-micrometer scales, in quantitative agreement with a microscopic light-matter interaction model. We further leverage optical spin-momentum locking to realize polarization-controlled waveguide steering. We generalize these observations across various vdW waveguides and empirically confirm a scaling law linking dielectric anisotropy to geometric spin-splitting. Our results establish highly anisotropic vdW waveguides as an ideal platform for densely integrated opto-spintronic technologies.
papers.abstract_cn: 光学自旋—轨道相互作用（optical spin-orbit interactions, SOI）将光子自旋与动量联系起来，为片上偏振控制和波束偏转提供了一条路径。然而，在亚微米尺度上实现足够强的光学 SOI 和非线性——这是高密度光子集成的前提——仍然是一项突出挑战。本文表明，高双折射范德华（van der Waals, vdW）波导提供了一个理想且芯片兼容的平台来应对这一限制。我们聚焦于铁电半导体 NbOI2，该材料表现出创纪录的光学非线性和介电各向异性。利用飞秒光学显微技术，我们在 NbOI2 平板波导中对跨越数十微米、突破全内反射限制的光传播和谐波转换进行了成像。我们报道了通过光学自旋霍尔效应产生的巨型光学自旋劈裂，该效应促进了亚微米尺度上光自旋流的空间分离，并与微观光—物质相互作用模型定量一致。我们进一步利用光学自旋—动量锁定实现了偏振控制的波导转向。我们将这些观测推广到多种 vdW 波导，并通过实验经验确认了一条将介电各向异性与几何自旋劈裂联系起来的标度律。我们的结果确立了高各向异性 vdW 波导作为高密度集成光自旋电子技术理想平台的地位。
papers.reading_notes:
Focus: 铁电材料.
What to check: 先进尺度下的可扩展性、与既有工艺平台的集成价值.
Context: Giant optical spin-orbit interactions in ferroelectric van der Waals waveguides.
